name: Air Domain Spells
description:
Air Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Feather Fall, Fog Cloud, Gust of Wind, Levitate
Tier 2: Fly, Wind Wall
Tier 3: Hallucinatory Terrain, Freedom of Movement
Tier 4: Control Winds, Wall of Force (as compressed air/pressure)
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
